steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The claim asks for evidence of Claudine's “strong emotional attachment” to the forests. The key signal is explicit emotional language — words that show her personal feeling about the woods, not just her observations of them.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: Choice C uses “my favorites” to claim personal connection to the woods and “makes my heart bleed” to express devastating emotion at their destruction — language that directly shows her deep personal attachment. The other choices either address family dynamics (A), offer observational landscape description (B), or appreciate the woods' magnificence and role without revealing personal emotional investment (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
